secrets.description: On-chain pot address that incoming entries are sent to and payouts are sent from. Generate with `usernode-cli account generate`; paste the `address` field here.
Secret key paired with APP_PUBKEY. Used by the payout signer to send the pot to the winner when the timer expires. Never logged or returned via the API.
Sidecar usernode RPC endpoint. Defaults to the in-network node service.
Countdown duration in milliseconds before the last sender is declared the winner. Defaults to 8h. Ignored in --local-dev (uses a fixed 2-minute timer).
